_about: Curator hand-overrides applied on top of the automatic selection. track_pick forces an exact Discogs tracklist title (token-matched; enrich.py); video_pick forces a specific YouTube id (assemble.py, highest precedence); video_note adds a factual note; row_note appends a free-form markdown note (may contain links) to a row's Notes.

row_note.21: Adeva's own master: [Adeva – Adeva](https://www.discogs.com/master/97780-Adeva-Adeva); crediting release: [Paul Simpson Featuring Adeva – Musical Freedom (Free At Last)](https://www.discogs.com/release/187738-Paul-Simpson-Featuring-Adeva-Musical-Freedom-Free-At-Last)
row_note.98: Followed by [Precious – Definition Of A Track / In Motion](https://www.discogs.com/master/168490-Precious-Definition-Of-A-Track-In-Motion) — the same cut given its own 12", subtitled 'From "Back To Basics"'.

track_pick.61: Pump Up The Music (Girly Girly Mix)
track_pick.62: You're No Good For Me (Classy Club Dub Mix)

video_note.40: linked video is titled according to the album title 'Flightt - Lets Get Jazzy (Dope Dub Mix)'
